arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for accessing and managing the domain in AWS

asset_size_bytes.description: Total size of assets stored in the domain, useful for monitoring storage usage

created_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the domain was created

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the domain in configurations

owner.description: AWS account ID of the domain owner, helpful for cross-account setups

repository_count.description: Number of repositories in the domain, useful for understanding domain usage

s3_bucket_arn.description: ARN of the S3 bucket used for domain storage

tags_all.description: Complete list of tags assigned to the domain for categorization
